Name: FFontOutlineSettings
Description: Settings for applying an outline to a font

Variables.Name: OutlineSize
Variables.Description: Size of the outline in slate units (at 1.0 font scale this unit is a pixel)

Variables.Name: OutlineMaterial
Variables.Description: Optional material to apply to the outline

Variables.Name: OutlineColor
Variables.Description: The color of the outline for any character in this font

Variables.Name: bSeparateFillAlpha
Variables.Description:
If checked, the outline will be completely translucent where the filled area will be.  This allows for a separate fill alpha value
	  The trade off when enabling this is slightly worse quality for completely opaque fills where the inner outline border meets the fill area
